hook.headline: Your IG comments → DMs, on autopilot.
hook.sub: we made stackpicks autodm · live now

cards.label: 01 · what
cards.title: Comments become DMs. Automatically.
cards.body: Someone comments LINK on your post. Within 60 seconds they get a real DM from you with the link. No tabs open, no copy-paste, no losing warm interest.

cards.label: 02 · why
cards.title: 80% of warm interest dies in your inbox.
cards.body: Every creator we talked to was losing 4 in 5 people who commented for a link. AutoDM closes the loop before the person scrolls away. The same posts, but 5× the conversions.

cards.label: 03 · setup
cards.title: 60-second setup.
cards.body: 1) Connect your IG account (Meta OAuth, official). 2) Tell it the keyword + the DM to send. 3) Done. Works on existing posts, new posts, reels. No code.

cards.label: 04 · safe
cards.title: Built on Meta's official API.
cards.body: AutoDM uses Instagram's official Private Reply API — same as ManyChat, Chatfuel, the big names. Your account is safe. No bots. No scraping. No risk of getting banned.

cards.label: 05 · price
cards.title: Starts at ₹499 · or $15.
cards.body: Creator tier ₹499/mo (~2,000 DMs). Pro ₹1,499/mo. Agency ₹4,999/mo. Yearly = 10× monthly (2 months free) + 25% DM cap bonus. Free trial · cancel anytime.

take.use_if: You're a creator or small team losing warm leads in your DMs and want them back without hiring a VA.
take.skip_if: You're not on Instagram in any serious way, or you reply to every DM personally and want to keep it that way.

cta.sub: free trial · no card · INR or USD
